title: Multiple Groups in Timeline

posts.author: Feastie (Phil Scholefield)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Devs,

I have a Board containing several Groups, each representing a project, which I show on a timeline.

I currently have the timeline grouped by project but, what would be really useful, is the ability have an additional grouping.

Each project has two manufacturing locations, which need to be easily identifiable: currently they are mixed together. Having two distinct rows within each project would allow for much clearer visibility of the two locations.

Thank you! Phil.
